arts.ttl: Eddie Howe sees Andrea Pirlo similarities in Newcastle star Sandro Tonali
arts.sum: The 24-year-old is back in fine form after completing a 10-month ban.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery issues new challenge to Aston Villa star after talks - 'I'm trying to push him'
arts.sum: Morgan Rogers has been an integral part of Unai Emery's Aston Villa side this season and scored his fifth goal of the season in last weekend's win over Manchester City

arts.ttl: Will Ollie Watkins or Jhon Duran start vs Newcastle? FPL update as Aston Villa decision made
arts.sum: As the festivities continue, online players must decide - similarly to the Aston Villa head coach - who they should pick between Ollie Watkins and Jhon Duran to lead their line on Game Week 18. FPL managers might have been blind-sided by Emery recently, but it would come as no surprise to see him start in attacking quarters on Boxing Day - not would it be a huge shock to see Watkins recalled.

arts.ttl: What Villa fans did to Newcastle hurt me - I didn't speak to anyone for an hour
arts.sum: Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action. Aston Villa are back in Premier League action on Boxing Day as they prepare to take on Newcastle United at St James' Park.
Newcastle's transfer wishlist for the 2025 January window.

arts.ttl: Villa Park redevelopment latest - £400m plan, station upgrades and more seats
arts.sum: The club's former CEO Christian Purslow outlined his plan to take Villa Park's capacity to 50,000 in time for Euro 2028 by building an entirely new North Stand, while a longer-term plan of adding a further 10,000 seats was mooted too. But shortly after being appointed as the club's president of business operations, Chris Heck shelved those plans given that the process would've slashed the stadium's capacity to around 36,000 for two seasons while a new North Stand was being built.

arts.ttl: I oversaw £798m stadium rebuild and hope to be involved as Newcastle United weigh up two plans
arts.sum: On the surface, this is a very different stadium to the Old Wembley, but the design team aimed to retain some of the 'best bits', including the pitch orientation and the size of the roof opening, during the £798m project. That is when Newcastle United hope to reach a decision on the long-term future of St James' Park and architect Angus Campbell will be among those watching on with interest.

arts.ttl: The Villa players you really wouldn't have wanted a ruck with
arts.sum: But Teale was hard and clean, he rarely mis-timed tackles (okay, so we acknowledge that that is a photo of him getting sent off, yes) and opposing players felt the full wrath of his challenge if they weren’t quick enough. Evans was a solid and consistent defender who arrived at Villa Park as a forward and got his fair share of goals during his time at the club.

arts.ttl: The unique reason which stopped Emmanuel Adebayor signing for Aston Villa
arts.sum: There are plenty of stories in footballing history about transfer deals falling through at the last minute. David De Gea’s proposed move to Real Madrid...

arts.ttl: I thought Newcastle United transfer was a wind up
arts.sum: Franz Carr reflects on his time at Newcastle United with a mix of fondness and regret, recalling how the £250,000 move from Nottingham Forest in 1991 was one that Brian Clough later lamented. United, under then manager Ossie Ardiles, had paid £250,000 to land Carr from Nottingham Forest in 1991 - although he revealed he thought news of the bid was a hoax!
